title: Dry Bulk Shipping - March 5, 2019
summary: Activity subdued - Capesize rates reached multi-year lows, as fixing activity in the Atlantic basin remains Keep an eye on inventories - We believe the anticipated reduction in exports out of Brazil will eventually Demand growth puzzle - The dry bulk market has been hit by an abundance of negative factors in the last Fleet growth low, but given flattish demand, not supportive - Although a ~3% growth is below historical Long term neutral - Slower economic growth and the maturing nature of the Chinese economy when it
